chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 510 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.4770/2019 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.4771/2019 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of bail application 27.09.2019 Mr. Ali Mardan Shar, Advocate for applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Applicant / accused Hatim Ali Kandhro, present in Court, seeks protective bail in Crime No.100/2012 registered at P.S Ahmedpur, District Khairpur for offences under Sections 365-A, 324, 353, 148, 149, PPC. It is stated that applicant / accused has been declared as proclaimed offender and presently, case is pending before learned Judge, Anti-Terrorism Court, Khairpur. It is further submitted that applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehends arrest as NBW has been issued against him. Serious mala fide on the part of the police has been alleged. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for a period of four days is granted to the applicant / accused subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Applicant / accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. Operation of NBW for the period of four days is suspended. This order shall cease to effect after expiry of four days or whenever the applicant / accused surrender before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. In case applicant / accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited.

This order shall cease to effect after expiry of four days or whenever the applicant / accused surrender before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. In case applicant / accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
